properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Through the valleys of this life I have wondered And I′ve worked for Jesus all along the way But now life's evening sun, for me is setting I have reached the ending of my way

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, I′ve been faithful in the service you have given And the harvest of the fields, Lord, I have done But now, my steps are growing weary Lord, I'm waiting, I'm ready to go home

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Looking back upon the life I′ve lived for Jesus I can see how he has blessed me all the way And each tear I shed just helped to keep me humble And each burden only taught me how to pray

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Though I hate to leave so many friends behind me And the parting of our way will break my heart But I'll wait for them inside the gates of heaven Where the children of God will never part

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: But now, my steps are growing weary Lord, I'm waiting, I′m ready to go home Lord I'm waiting, I'm ready to go home
